name: HTML file to Markdown conversion
prompt: Convert this HTML file at ./pages/about.html to markdown.
expected_behavior: Use 'uvx markitdown' for HTML files (or web-to-md if URL)
Handle local .html file with markitdown directly
success_criteria: Uses correct tool: 'uvx markitdown' for local HTML
Produces clean markdown without excessive HTML artifacts
Handles embedded images by referencing them
edge_cases: HTML with heavy JavaScript → static conversion won't include JS-rendered content
HTML with CSS classes only (no semantic markup) → may lose formatting cues
Embedded fonts/icons → not preserved in markdown output
